word: H2616 - חָסַד - châçad - khaw-sad' - Shew self merciful

sections.paragraph:
Original: חסד

Transliteration: châsad

Phonetic: khaw-sad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be good, be kind
    1. (Hithpael) to show kindness to oneself
  2. to be reproached, be ashamed
    1. (Piel) to be put to shame, be reproached

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 698,699

Part(s) of speech: Verb
